name: aleph-tools
description: Shared image OCR gateway for Aleph projects.

scripts.migrate:check:preview: node scripts/check-migration-env.mjs preview && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler d1 migrations list aleph-tools-preview --remote --config wrangler.migrations-preview.jsonc
scripts.migrate:check:prod: node scripts/check-migration-env.mjs prod && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler d1 migrations list aleph-tools-prod --remote --config wrangler.migrations-prod.jsonc
scripts.deploy:dry-run:preview: pnpm deploy:generate:preview && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.generated-preview.json
scripts.deploy:dry-run:prod: pnpm deploy:generate:prod && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.generated-prod.json
scripts.migrate:preview: node scripts/check-migration-env.mjs preview && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler d1 migrations apply aleph-tools-preview --remote --config wrangler.migrations-preview.jsonc
scripts.migrate:prod: node scripts/check-migration-env.mjs prod && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler d1 migrations apply aleph-tools-prod --remote --config wrangler.migrations-prod.jsonc
scripts.deploy:preview: pnpm deploy:generate:preview && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.generated-preview.json
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm deploy:generate:prod && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.generated-prod.json
